templateMeta.title: Smart home hub
templateMeta.description: Always-on home gateway that bridges Wi-Fi, Thread/Zigbee, and a local rules engine for automation.

product.formFactor: Desktop puck, 95 mm diameter × 32 mm height
checklistContexts: Give households one reliable hub for lights, sensors, and locks without depending only on the cloud.
Homeowners and renters setting up multi-device automation.
Ethernet + Wi-Fi, Thread/Zigbee radio, Matter controller path, fanless thermal design, BOM under $70.
Mobile onboarding app, local rules engine, optional remote access via account.
Radio certifications (FCC/CE) and Matter certification path for controller role.
Easy setup, local automations when internet drops, broad device compatibility, quiet always-on design.
MVP: onboarding, local scenes, mobile remote access; voice assistants as phase 2.
checklistFeatures:
Use case: One-app device onboarding

How to use: Plug in hub, open app, follow QR setup.

Operating condition: Home Wi-Fi required for first setup.

Acceptance criteria: First device paired in ≤ 5 minutes for 90% of trials.

Metrics: Setup completion rate, support tickets per activation.

Use case: Local automations

How to use: Create scenes in app; hub executes locally.

Operating condition: Devices already paired to hub radio.

Acceptance criteria: Scene executes offline within 1 second of trigger.

Metrics: Offline scene success rate, mean rule latency.
